checkin.journal:
Early flight wake up at 5 am - raxi driver was a bit in a rush - wasnt that nice
Early taxi
Flight back home watched lokwood and co snd break point and 2 more movies 🍿 on plane ✈️ 
Arrived to Dubai feels good to be back
Sitting bones hurted more than going to London for sure, fun fact hip didnt bug me coz wasnt doing exercises of course
Inspired by: the A380 plane - soo big and how fast they get the luggage is amazing
Didnt like: that taxi drive and that I ate so much sweets on the plane fhat wa
